ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., property, auto, health) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident leading to the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the claim */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the claim */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the claim */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was last updated */,
  "insured_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insured person */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster handling the claim */,
  "loss_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loss */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit for the claim */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the claim */,
  "claim_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number assigned by the insurance company */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., property, auto, health) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "insured_name" TEXT /* Name of the insured */,
  "insured_address" TEXT /* Address of the insured */,
  "insured_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the insured */,
  "insured_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insured person */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of premium payments (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is up for renewal */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coverage */,
  "insured_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insured */,
  "insured_contact_address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_details" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "accident_year" INTEGER /* Year of the accident */,
  "development_period" INTEGER /* Development period of the claim */,
  "calendar_year" INTEGER /* Calendar year of the claim */,
  "paid_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid on the claim */,
  "outstanding_amount" REAL /* Outstanding amount of the claim */,
  "incurred_loss" REAL /* Total incurred loss on the claim */,
  "paid_increase" REAL /* Increase in the paid amount since the last period */,
  "estimated_final_loss" REAL /* Estimated final loss amount */,
  "total_paid_to_date" REAL /* Total amount paid to date */,
  "total_outstanding_to_date" REAL /* Total outstanding amount to date */,
  "reserves_amount" REAL /* Amount reserved for the claim */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the claims adjuster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id", "development_period")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Old status of the claim */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the claim */,
  "old_claim_amount" REAL /* Old claim amount */,
  "new_claim_amount" REAL /* New claim amount */,
  "old_claim_status_reason" TEXT /* Old reason for the claim status */,
  "new_claim_status_reason" TEXT /* New reason for the claim status */,
  "old_coverage_limit" REAL /* Old coverage limit */,
  "new_coverage_limit" REAL /* New coverage limit */,
  "old_deductible" REAL /* Old deductible */,
  "new_deductible" REAL /* New deductible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims adjuster, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's department */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt for the password hash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., accident report, medical records) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, reviewed, approved) */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "document_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "note_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the note (e.g., public, private) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "note_version" INTEGER /* Version of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notes_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the adjustment is associated with */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "adjustment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_status" TEXT /* Status of the adjustment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_adjustments_adjusted_by FOREIGN KEY ("adjusted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_adjustments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "paid_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_paid_by FOREIGN KEY ("paid_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim that was submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "submission_method" TEXT /* Method of submission (e.g., online, mail) */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the claim */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, received, processed) */,
  "submission_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the submission */,
  "submission_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_submissions_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_submissions_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary claim */,
  "related_claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related claim */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sub-claim, related incident) */,
  "relation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  "relation_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_relations_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_relations_related_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
